title: Scope the V4 invariant ticket
description: Compare the existing V3 and V4 bond test suites to determine what 'invariant checks' means in this repository and whether the current branch already contains the expected coverage.

title: Map V4 accounting invariants to contract flows
description: Trace createBond, challenge, ruleForPoster, ruleForChallenger, concede, withdrawBond, and claimTimeout in SimpleBondV4 so each invariant assertion is grounded in the contract's escrow and payout behavior.

title: Ensure SimpleBondV4 invariant checks exist
description: If coverage is missing, add example-based checks in test/SimpleBondV4.test.js for the fixed bond pool after poster wins, stable bond/challenge/judge-fee thresholds across queued challenges, and total-token conservation. If the checks are already present, treat this node as verification-only.

title: Verify the SimpleBondV4 suite
description: Run the targeted Hardhat suite for test/SimpleBondV4.test.js and confirm the invariant checks pass without regressing the surrounding challenge-flow coverage.
